last_completed_item: D-100 — Signature regenerating directional thruster burst as a vertical-slice feel pillar
current_item: D-101 — Thruster burst charge and regeneration model
next_action: Ask exactly one concise A/B/C decision card selecting whether the signature thruster uses one fast-recharging charge, two or three independently regenerating charges that may be chained, or a continuous fuel meter supporting variable-length boosts. Preserve the signature addictive movement goal, physical displacement rather than long universal invulnerability, keyboard and gamepad controls, later Android controls, speedrunning and route mastery, weapon-specific movement effects, broad difficulty accessibility, and future co-op. Include responsiveness, chain-dashing, panic-spam, recharge downtime, readability, tuning complexity, level-design impact, accessibility adjustments, and competitive determinism. Put the recommendation after all A/B/C options, at the end of the card. Queue accepted decisions D-101 through D-110 and persist the complete batch at D-110 before asking D-111, unless a context handoff or explicit user instruction requires earlier persistence.
